bids.reasoning: The opponent's opening offer provides me with my absolute worst utility across all issues, despite their appealing message which I treat as cheap talk. Since it is the very beginning of the negotiation (t=0.0), I will reciprocate by proposing the optimal package for myself to firmly anchor our negotiations.
